titleStmt.title: SII 6.647: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 647. (A.R. No. 201 of 1899). ON THE SAME TIER.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . caraṇasarōruhavihatavilōcanatrilōcanapramukhākhilaprithvīśvarakāritakāvērītīra karikālakularatnapradīpāhitakunūrāṁkuśa śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara tribhuvanamalladēvacōḍamahārājula kulavadhūratnaṁbai
na kāmidēvi śakavarṣamulu 1070 gunēṇṭi caitra vimala tritīyyayu budhavāramu viṣuvusaṁkrāṁttinimittamuna nijarājadhāniyainaṁ gammanāṁṭilōni koṭyadona śrīkēśavadēvaraku nakhaṇḍadīpamunaku niccina Eḍlu 55 . prabhavaraśaka
nṛpābdaṁbulu gagaṇaparvvatāṁbararātripatisaṁkhyaṁdanaru vibhavābdamunaṁ jaitra vimala tritīyya vidhusutudinamuna viṣuvusaṁkrāṁttiṁ dribhuvanamalladhātrināthu kulasatīratnamagu kāmidēvi sadbhaktiṁ dribhuvanādhipuna kettiṁcce nakhaṇḍadīpaṁbu
kēśavadēvara koppa . 1 Ilanamarādrināthunaku nallamahīpatiki kīrttikiṁ bolupuga vennamāṁbikakuṁ buṭṭinalakṣaṇi gāmidēvi mikkili sirisaṁtatiṁbaḍasi kēśavadēvarakunu mudaṁbutō nilipe nakhaṇḍadīpa mogi niṁggiśaśulugalayaṁttagālamunu [. 2*]
dēvakarmmu AddaAyitabōyuṁḍu tana putrānupautrikamu nitya māneṁḍu neyi Akhaṇḍadīpamunaku pōyaṁgalavāṁḍu .
Digital edition of SII 6.647 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
